nasb.text: If the people of the land, however, should ever disregard that man when he gives any of his offspring to Molech, so as not to put him to death,

esv.text: And if the people of the land do at all close their eyes to that man when he gives one of his children to Molech, and do not put him to death,

cnv.text: 如果有人把他的兒子獻給摩洛，而本地的人掩目不看，不把他處死，

ccb.text: 如果那地方的人对此置之不理，没有处死那人，
